calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73329541 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73329541 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73329541/events/evt-petition-disposition | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73329541 -maxdepth 5 -type f -not -path '*/predictions/*' -not -name 'outcome.json' -print | sort && find data/cases/scotus/73329541 -maxdepth 5 -type d -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73329541/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,120p' data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && sed -n '1,700p' data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,200p' data/cases/scotus/73329541/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);
const names = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|case law|legal|search opinions|citation/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(names);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '45,175p' metrics/statpack.md && sed -n '1,220p' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.sections[] | [.name // .title // \"\", .dimension // \"\", (.scope // \"\")] | @tsv' metrics/statpack.json && jq -r '.. | objects | select(has(\"fee_class\") or has(\"salience_band\")) | @json' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 80","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Bowe v. United States",court:["scotus"],filed_after:"2026-01-01",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","citation","cluster_id","dateFiled","docketNumber","opinions","syllabus"],num_results:5}); text(result);
const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11239035,fields:["id","type","author","per_curiam","html_with_citations"]}); text(result);
const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:776425,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); text(result);
const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:167281,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); text(result);

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"St. Clair v. Quick",court:["ca10"],docket_number:"24-7090",filed_after:"2025-10-16",filed_before:"2025-10-18",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","citation","cluster_id","dateFiled","docketNumber","opinions"],num_results:10}); text(result);

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Michael St. Clair\" AND \"Christe Quick\"",court:["ca10"],filed_after:"2025-01-01",filed_before:"2026-02-07",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","citation","cluster_id","dateFiled","docketNumber","opinions"],num_results:10}); text(result);

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Bowe AND \"2241\" AND \"2244(d)\"",filed_after:"2026-01-09",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["absolute_url","caseName","citation","cluster_id","court_citation_string","dateFiled","docketNumber","opinions"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:20}); text(result);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73329541/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z && mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73329541/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output); if(r.exit_code!==0) text(`exit ${r.exit_code}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data && find data/cases/scotus/73329541/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73329541/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output
